tasks.instruction: In a post-match discussion thread about a recent fixture you open from search results, sort comments by most liked and like three different comments that mention the refereeing.

target_names: Post-match comment mentioning referee losing control
Reply agreeing and mentioning referee only punished Red City
Comment complaining about shocking referee and missed handball
Comment saying people will focus on the referee but also on missed chances
Neutral comment about inconsistent refereeing
Comment asking if the referee looked nervous from kick-off
